name: MHA- Hawks, Endeavor, Shoto
description:
YOUR FATHER IS HAWKS, ENDEAVOR WANTS YOU TO MEET SHOTO

—·—·—

Okay so.. You’re Hawks’ daughter and one day Endeavor invites Hawks and his family to dinner. You’re Hawks’ only family member so you go with him and you meet Shoto once you get there. Shoto is the same age as you.
